title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Forever 21 India

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Forever 21 India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Forever 21 India! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Dhanbad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Forever 21 India:
Forever 21 India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Forever 21 India!
